method: Fresh agents ran the current skill in audit-only mode on descriptive-drift and binding-rule fixtures.
evidence: discovered PRODUCT.md as the repository-owned durable owner
classified the 4100 versus 4200 claim as descriptive drift
returned exact proposed wording and code plus test evidence in chat
found no binding contradiction or unverified claim
left HEAD and the working tree unchanged in both cases
classified a documented maximum of 10 versus implemented and tested 12 as a binding-rule contradiction
preserved the authoritative rule and requested a maintainer decision instead of normalizing documentation to code
